fintech.heading: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif
fintech.notes: Inter permitted as BODY ONLY in fintech for data legibility. Heading font provides distinctiveness.

healthcare.heading: 'Outfit', 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif
healthcare.notes: Soothing, readable sans-serif pairing optimized for accessibility.

devtools.heading: 'Geist Sans', 'Cabinet Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif
devtools.notes: Geist Sans/Mono are self-hosted or Vercel CDN. Cabinet Grotesk and General Sans available via Fontshare.

ecommerce.heading: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Playfair Display', 'Georgia', serif
ecommerce.notes: Editorial serif heading + clean sans body. Lato permitted here as workhorse body only.

education.heading: 'Nunito', 'Baloo 2', 'Poppins', sans-serif
education.notes: Playful, rounded sans-serif. Poppins permitted as fallback only in education domain.

media.heading: 'Playfair Display', 'Libre Baskerville', 'Georgia', serif
media.notes: Editorial serif pairing. Both heading and body are serif for traditional publishing aesthetic.

government.heading: 'GDS Transport', 'Noto Sans', 'Arial', sans-serif
government.notes: GDS Transport is UK Government's proprietary font (self-hosted). Noto Sans provides universal language coverage. System fonts preferred for reliability.

creative.heading: 'Clash Display', 'Bricolage Grotesque', 'Anton', sans-serif
creative.notes: Clash Display and Satoshi are foundry fonts (Fontshare or self-hosted). Recursive is a variable font with casual/linear axis.

pairing_rules: Contrast families: pair serif heading with sans body, or vice versa
Match x-heights between heading and body fonts for optical harmony
One display font + one workhorse font per domain
Variable fonts preferred (fewer network requests, more axes to play with)
Always include system-ui fallback in the stack
Never use banned fonts as primary — only as fallbacks in specific domains
Self-hosted fonts should include woff2 format minimum (best compression)
Mono fonts should have clear glyph differentiation (0 vs O, 1 vs l vs I)
